welcome.title: Hi! 👋
welcome.subtitle: Your AI co-pilot to grow your idea, brand, project or business
welcome.duration: 3–5 min.  Custom strategy for YOUR niche. Grow & monitize without overwhelm

project.question: What project do you want to boost?
project.subtitle: If you have several projects, let's start with the one you prioritize first
project.nameLabel: What's the name of your project, artist or business?

journeyStage.title: Where Are You Right Now?
journeyStage.subtitle: Pick where you are today. I'll guide you from there.

starting.title: Starting from Zero
starting.description: I have an idea but haven't launched yet. I need a clear roadmap.

existing.title: Already Out There
existing.description: I'm active online with some audience. Ready to grow strategically.

legacy.title: Building Legacy
legacy.description: I have an established brand with revenue. Ready to scale big.

yourIdea.title: Tell Us About Your Vision
yourIdea.subtitle: Let's bring your idea to life
yourIdea.specificity: The more specific you are, the better we can guide you 🎯
yourIdea.placeholder: Example: I want to create content about sustainable fashion for Gen Z, mixing educational videos with behind-the-scenes of my design process. My audience cares about ethical consumption and wants to look stylish while making conscious choices...
yourIdea.feedbackMedium: 👍 Good start! Add more details for better recommendations.
yourIdea.feedbackGood: ✨ Excellent! We have everything we need.
yourIdea.switchToAIHelp: 💭 Not sure yet? Let AI help you →
yourIdea.aiHelpDescription: Just tell us your niche or interest
yourIdea.nichePlaceholder: e.g., Fitness, Travel, Tech Reviews, Cooking...
yourIdea.aiHelpSuccess: 🎯 Great! We'll suggest ideas in your niche.

goalsBlockers.title: Your Goals
goalsBlockers.subtitle: What's your main goal right now?

digitalPresence.titleStarting: Any site / platform you want to start from?
digitalPresence.subtitleStarting: Optional. Add 1–3 existing accounts to leverage
digitalPresence.subtitleExisting: Add 1–3 of your most active platforms. Just your username or profile link.
digitalPresence.maxPlatformsNote: Choose up to 3 platforms for now. You can add more later.
digitalPresence.noPresenceLabel: I have no digital presence yet
